---
title: "Auditoría Integral RCBPA Arequipa"
subtitle: "Reconstrucción reproducible, tasas y trazabilidad"
author: "Equipo técnico del RCBPA"
lang: es
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    css: portal_rcbpa_src/assets/portal.css
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(fs)
library(knitr)
root <- normalizePath("..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
read_csv_safe <- function(...) readr::read_csv(fs::path(root, ...), show_col_types = FALSE)
normalize_asr <- function(df, count_col) {
  if (!count_col %in% names(df)) df[[count_col]] <- numeric()
  df %>%
    mutate(
      !!count_col := as.numeric(.data[[count_col]]),
      population_mid = as.numeric(population_mid),
      asr_per_100k = as.numeric(asr_per_100k),
      crude_period_rate_per_100k = as.numeric(crude_period_rate_per_100k)
    )
}
preflight <- read_csv_safe("REPORTS", "preflight_checks.csv")
qc_pop <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_population_denominators.csv")
qc_rates <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_rates_consistency.csv")
qc_inc_raw <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_incidence_raw_external_summary.csv")
qc_inc_internal <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_incidence_internal_ruleset_impact.csv")
qc_inc_crude_only <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_incidence_missing_population_join_cases.csv")
qc_mortality_trace <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_mortality_traceability_by_year.csv")
qc_mortality_discordance <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_mortality_vital_date_discordance.csv")
qc_raw_followup <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_raw_followup_external_summary.csv")
qc_internal_mortality <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_internal_mortality_ruleset_impact.csv")
qc_mortality_resolution <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "QC", "qc_mortality_resolution_summary.csv")
inc_asr <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "RATES", "incidence_rates_asr_period.csv") %>% normalize_asr("cases_period")
mort_asr <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "RATES", "mortality_rates_asr_period.csv") %>% normalize_asr("deaths_period")
mort_asr_sensitivity <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "RATES", "mortality_rates_sensitivity_asr_period.csv") %>% normalize_asr("deaths_period")
mort_sensitivity <- read_csv_safe("DATA", "DERIVED", "RATES", "mortality_sensitivity_summary.csv")
```

# Estado general

```{r}
tibble(
  chequeos_totales = nrow(preflight),
  chequeos_ok = sum(preflight$status),
  denominadores_checks = nrow(qc_pop),
  tasas_checks = nrow(qc_rates)
) %>% knitr::kable()
```

# Preflight

```{r}
preflight %>% select(check_type, item, status, details) %>% knitr::kable()
```

# Denominadores

```{r}
qc_pop %>% knitr::kable()
```

# Calidad raw de incidencia

```{r}
qc_inc_raw %>% knitr::kable()
```

# QC interno de incidencia

```{r}
qc_inc_internal %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
qc_inc_crude_only %>% knitr::kable()
```

# Tasas ajustadas del período

```{r}
bind_rows(
  inc_asr %>% transmute(module = "incidencia", sex, asr_per_100k, crude_period_rate_per_100k),
  mort_asr %>% transmute(module = "mortalidad", sex, asr_per_100k, crude_period_rate_per_100k)
) %>% knitr::kable()
```

# QC de tasas

```{r}
qc_rates %>% knitr::kable()
```

# Calidad raw de seguimiento

```{r}
qc_raw_followup %>% knitr::kable()
```

# QC interno de mortalidad y resolución

```{r}
qc_mortality_trace %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
mort_sensitivity %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
qc_internal_mortality %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
qc_mortality_resolution %>% head(20) %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
bind_rows(
  mort_asr %>% mutate(ruleset = "official_strict_iarc"),
  mort_asr_sensitivity %>% mutate(ruleset = "sensitivity_dead_with_fuc_proxy")
) %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
qc_mortality_discordance %>%
  count(discordance_type, sort = TRUE) %>%
  knitr::kable()
```
